title: EDEN experiment config
description: Declarative input to an EDEN experiment. Fields here are the host-mechanism-independent core: objective, metrics schema, concurrency bound, termination bounds. Role bindings (how the planner, implementer, and evaluator are hosted — local subprocess, HTTP service, etc.) are implementation-defined and land under additional properties until the role-binding chapter is written in Phase 2.

max_wall_time.description: Hard ceiling on elapsed wall time; format is a positive integer followed by one of s, m, h, d.

expr.description: Scalar expression over fields of metrics_schema.

convergence_window.description: Terminate if the objective has not improved in this many trials.

target_condition.description: Condition over metrics that terminates the experiment when satisfied.
